<<Emily runs a dog rescue center and currently has 25 dogs.>>  
<<On Thursday, she received 4 puppies from a nearby town.>>  
<<On Friday, a family brought in a stray dog they had found.>>  
<<On Saturday, 2 families adopted 3 dogs each.>>  
<<This means Emily's total number of dogs is [25 + 4 + 1 + 6].>>  
<<The total number of dogs she currently has in her rescue center is [25 + 4 + 1 + 6].>>  
***  
<<The final count of dogs in her rescue center is [25 + 4 + 1 + 6].>>  
<<Emily currently has [25 + 4 + 1 + 6] dogs in her rescue center.>>
